chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 559 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on MA 6950/2025. 3. For orders on MA 6951/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For hearing of MA 6952/2025. 27.11.2025. Mr. Omparkash Goklani, Advocate for applicants. Ms. Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for State alongwith SIP Kashif Khan PS City Hyderabad and SIP Muhammad Faisal Arain PS B-Section Latifabad. = Reports submitted by SHO PS City Hyderabad and SHO PS B-Section, Latifabad are taken on record. Counsel for the applicants does not wish to proceed with this lis as apparently an FIR has already been registered. Accordingly, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed as withdrawn alongwith pending applications. JUDGE Tufail
